final:
module top_module(
    input  clk,
    input  rst,
    output foo);reg foo_i;

assign foo = foo_i;

always @ (posedge clk or posedge rst)
    if (rst == 1'b1) begin
        foo_i <= 0;
    end
    else begin
        foo_i <= !foo_i; 
    end


  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      foo_i <= rst;
    end
  end

endmodule
